# 📅 Daily Log — Tuesday, April 28, 2026

**Theme:** Codebase Audit Day + Hackathon Sprint Prep
**Generated by:** Second Brain Sync (04:00 EDT)

## 🎯 Day Summary

Today was a **full codebase audit day** across all teams. Jordan requested every agent clone all repos, audit the codebase, check brain context, and identify gaps before the May 11 hackathon deadlines. Four independent audits were completed, producing a unified picture of the project's health and what needs building.

**Key outcome:** All 161-217 Solidity tests passing across 5 repos. The codebase is solid — the main gaps are deployment, demo materials, and the Solana port.

---

## 👥 Team Activity

### 🟢 YoYo (Strategies)
- **Completed:** Full repo audit — cloned all 21 personal + 7 org repos
- **Key finding:** Foundry freshly installed, gh CLI authenticated (ProtoJay4789)
- **Assessment:** agent-economy-solana is the canonical foundation; agent-escrow is production-quality
- **Gaps flagged:** No deploy scripts in agent-escrow, broken .gitmodules, missing READMEs
- **Recommendation:** Agent-escrow + kite-agent-commerce are deploy-ready; agent-escrow-solana needs tests

### 🟢 DMOB (Smart Contracts)
- **Completed:** Full audit with security review of all 3 main repos
- **Key finding:** agent-economy-solana is **misnamed** — it's pure Solidity/EVM, zero Solana code
- **Critical security issues found:**
  - `AgentKeeper.checkAndExecute()` — arbitrary external call vulnerability (CRITICAL)
  - `JobEscrow.releasePayment()` — push pattern can get stuck if agent reverts (CRITICAL)
  - `kite-agent-commerce` missing ReentrancyGuard on processPayment (MEDIUM)
- **Effort estimate:** Kite AI ~12-15hrs, Solana Frontier full build ~40-55hrs (stretch for 13 days)
- **Sprint plan created:** Apr 29 deploy Kite AI → May 1 demo → May 2-9 Solana build → May 11 submit both

### 🟢 Desmond (Content)
- **Completed:** Codebase audit from content/documentation perspective
- **Key finding:** All 217 tests passing across 5 repos (highest count — included kite-consolidation)
- **Gaps flagged:** No GitHub auth on Desmond's machine, swarms-solana-adapter needs tests, gentech-vault repo is empty
- **Brain context recovered:** 8-layer AAE architecture, REP + $TECH dual token model, "More winners than losers" philosophy

### 🟢 Gentech (Coordination)
- **Completed:** Full codebase audit + vault context review
- **Key finding:** 944 skills installed, 23 cron jobs running, Hermes 5 commits behind (low-risk)
- **Infrastructure:** All dev tools operational (git, gh, Node, Python, Foundry, Cargo, Docker)
- **Brain backup:** Updated Apr 28, operational
